items.hook: The Believers is a 2008 novel by Zoë Heller.
items.body: It depicts the family of a controversial lawyer in New York after a stroke renders him comatose. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: Beginning of the McMahon–Hussein Correspondence between Hussein bin Ali, Sharif of Mecca and the British official Henry McMahon concerning the Arab Revolt against the Ottoman Empire.
items.body: The McMahon–Hussein correspondence is a series of letters that were exchanged during World War I, in which the government of the United Kingdom agreed to recognize Arab independence in a large region after the war in exchange for the Sharif of Mecca launching the Arab Revolt against the Ottoman Empire. Worth a quiet trip down the rabbit hole.

items.hook: Louis VIII becomes King of France upon the death of his father, Philip II.

items.hook: Fyataru is a fictional character of Bengali novelist and poet Nabarun Bhattacharya.
items.body: Fyatarus are lower class flying human beings who like to make chaos in the so-called civil society. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: Interview: Jerry Carlsson, Frida Mårtensson • Director and producer of Selamlik - “The queer perspective on war has not often been told in cinema” - Karlovy Vary 2026 - KVIFF Industry Days

items.hook: Bectu head Philippa Childs to leave UK union
items.body: She will stand down in January 2027.

items.hook: Peruvian explorer and farmer Agustín Lizárraga discovers Machu Picchu, the "Lost City of the Incas".
items.body: Agustín Lizárraga Ruiz was a Peruvian explorer and farmer who visited the Inca site of Machu Picchu on 14 July 1902, nine years before American explorer Hiram Bingham brought it to international attention. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: Mariner 4 flyby of Mars takes the first close-up photos of another planet. The photographs take approximately six hours to be transmitted back to Earth.
items.body: Mariner 4 was the fourth in a series of spacecraft intended for planetary exploration in a flyby mode. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: The Finnish War: the Battle of Lapua is fought.
items.body: The Finnish War was fought between the Kingdom of Sweden and the Russian Empire from 21 February 1808 to 17 September 1809 as part of the Napoleonic Wars. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: Ferrari take their first Formula One grand prix victory at the British Grand Prix at Silverstone.
items.body: Ferrari S.p.A, currently competing as Scuderia Ferrari HP, is the racing division of luxury Italian auto manufacturer Ferrari and the racing team that competes in Formula One racing. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: Why praying for rain appears to work – but only in some places
items.body: In some parts of the world, the probability of rain rises with every day it doesn’t rain, and communities in these places are more likely to carry out rain-making rituals

items.hook: Blue singer Lee Ryan loses plane assault appeal
items.body: The Blue singer was challenging a conviction for assaulting a cabin crew member on a flight.
